jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NSE
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
